LOOPER
BOARDINTAKEPRIORITIZETRIAGESPECBACKLOGCAPACITYREPORTINGMETRICSPORTFOLIODOCSGOVERNANCEASSISTANTDIALSAUDIT
METHODOLOGY v1.0·CHAIN VERIFIED

INTEGRATIONS

Functional v1 — Jira as initiative source, Confluence for cabinet readout publish. Configure via environment variables on the deployment.

JIRA

Status: NOT CONFIGURED

Rubric fields live in issue property looper.v1. Push writes rank, score, tier, and receipts back to Jira.

CONFLUENCE

Status: NOT CONFIGURED
ENV VARS
JIRA_SITE, JIRA_EMAIL, JIRA_API_TOKEN, JIRA_PROJECT_KEY or JIRA_JQL
CONFLUENCE_SPACE_KEY, CONFLUENCE_PARENT_PAGE_ID, CONFLUENCE_PUBLISH_PAGE_ID (optional)
Uses same Atlassian API token as Jira when Confluence-specific vars omitted.
TAMPER-EVIDENT DECISION CHAIN · Every line on this surface is regenerated from the system of record and cites a ledger receipt — it cannot go stale, and it cannot be quietly rewritten. SYNTHETIC DEMO DATA; NO CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION. Deterministic · zero-LLM in the decision path · local-first.
